75719.subject: Two big gambles
75719.body:
Editor's Digest 

Автор: Financial Times


Автор: Financial Times

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/two-big-gambles-financial-times-xcmxc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BQcXPlRO7Sp6KDQD9ECEQrg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0HHVS8_BSaCsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrdx336a~ac-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdx336a-ac
  
Hello from the FT newsroom, where we are covering two big gambles on the right wing of European politics.  Britain’s Nigel Farage and France’s Marine Le Pen both stand accused of financial irregularities, which threaten their paths to power: Farage is facing a parliamentary standards investigation over his failure to declare a £5mn gift and Le Pen has been convicted of embezzling EU funds.  On Tuesday, both responded by putting themselves up for election: a by-election for Farage and a presidential race for Le Pen. As our editorial board writes, the Reform UK and Rassemblement National leaders want to portray themselves as “siding with the people against a supposedly self-serving political elite” — a classic populist move.  It’s unclear if either gamble will pay off. After the other main UK parties refused to field candidates, Farage faces a contest with just one opponent: a man in a bin costume. And as our Europe editor Ben Hall writes, Le Pen’s strategy could end up helping her mainstream opponents who are lagging behind her in the polls. My choices this week At this week’s Nato summit, US President Donald Trump pivoted from outspoken criticism of Ukrainian leader Volodymyr Zelenskyy to granting Kyiv a licence to make US weapons. Meanwhile, the US and Iran resumed tit-for-tat strikes. Tech group Palantir’s enthusiastic embrace of Trump’s policies and its defence of Israel’s war in Gaza have spurred outrage in the US and Europe. Here’s how the tech group’s politics could threaten the core of its $330bn business. (Free to read) Since coming to power in 2024, Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto has railed against members of the business elite, calling them “thieves and corruptors”. The discord could spell trouble for south-east Asia’s largest economy. On Tuesday, Argentina beat Egypt to a place in the World Cup quarter-finals. As expected, Lionel Messi played a big part. But how far can Argentina get with a strategy built around a 39-year-old player? (Free to read) For three decades, Tesco, the UK’s biggest supermarket, has tried to build a global retail empire. But that dream could soon be over. Europe is enduring its third heatwave of the year. Find out how capitals across the world’s fastest-warming continent are preparing for a world of extreme heat. Thanks for reading, Roula Khalaf, FT editor Recommended newsletters for you White House Watch What Tru

75714.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Swift launches blockchain ledger with 17 banks
75714.body:
Aave Labs rolls out Stable Vaults, offering predictable stablecoin yield aimed at mainstream users | Hyundai Card completes its first real-world stablecoin pilot with Avalanche, Tether | BitGo CEO says single-digit percentages of bitcoin's supply are 'probably right' for large holders amid Strategy's sale | INTERPOL-led global fraud crackdown arrests over 5,800, uncovers crypto laundering network tied to $122.5 million wallet |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Thursday! Analysts say *bitcoin* may be entering the final stages of its bear market ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407713/bottom-building-in-progress-analysts-say-bitcoin-holder-capitulation-signals-late-stage-bear-market?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) , with onchain data suggesting long-term holder capitulation is helping lay the groundwork for a potential bottom.

In today's newsletter, *Swift* launches its blockchain-based ledger for a cross-border payments pilot, *Aave Labs* rolls out *Stable Vaults* , *Hyundai Card* tests stablecoin-based cross-border remittance with *Tether* and *Avalanche* , plus more.

Meanwhile, a *Supreme Court* ruling expanding *Trump's* authority over federal agencies raises questions for the *SEC* and *CFTC* as crypto rulemaking advances, Sarah Wynn reports ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407750/supreme-court-ruling-expanding-trumps-authority-over-federal-agencies-raises-questions-for-sec-cftc-as-crypto-rulemaking-advances?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) in The Block's latest feature piece.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🌐 Swift launches blockchain ledger for tokenized deposit pilot with 17 banks*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407687/swift-launches-blockchain-ledger-for-tokenized-deposit-pilot-with-17-banks?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Payment network *Swift* launched a blockchain-based shared ledger for 17 banks to pilot cross-border payments using tokenized deposits, its first live use case for the technology.

* The pilot spans six continents and includes *Citi* , *HSBC* , *UBS* , *BNP Paribas* , *Standard Chartered* , *Wells Fargo* , and *MUFG Bank* , among other global lenders.
* The ledger

75709.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 9
75709.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-9-cryptobeholder-aewzf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bkcs3DYHwQeCFoaQ3Vj%2B0GQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0QS_--b--ZCck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrdps80f~qv-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrdps80f-qv
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Infrastructure and institutions took center stage as Swift and Sony pushed deeper into tokenization, while a wallet exploit, a $122M scam bust, and a stalled market-structure bill kept sentiment cautious. Adoption advances, but safety and regulatory questions linger. 🏦 Swift activates blockchain ledger with 17 global banks Swift switched on its blockchain-based shared ledger for initial use, with 17 major banks — including HSBC, UBS, Wells Fargo and Citi — preparing to pilot live 24/7 cross-border payments using tokenized deposits, a significant step toward mainstream tokenization. Read full story → 🏛️ Sony Bank wins US regulatory nod to issue stablecoins Sony Bank secured conditional approval from the OCC to establish a US stablecoin trust bank, capitalized with $40 million, marking another major corporate entrant into the regulated dollar-stablecoin market. More details → 🪙 New Hampshire becomes first state to approve Bitcoin treasury New Hampshire became the first US state to approve Bitcoin treasury investments and is now eyeing a $100 million Bitcoin-backed bond, a landmark move that could set a template for state-level crypto adoption. Read more → 🚨 Interpol busts $122M crypto romance-scam network An Interpol operation uncovered a single crypto wallet that processed more than $122.5 million tied to romance-scam laundering, part of a global anti-fraud sweep that led to 5,811 arrests. See details → 🔓 Cardano wallet exploit drains $2.4M in ADA A flaw in SecondFi's wallet address-generation system drained roughly $2.4 million in ADA from 374 wallets, prompting EMURGO to step back from Cardano's Pentad infrastructure group to focus on fund recovery. Read full story → 📉 Strategy sells 3,588 BTC in its largest divestment yet Strategy offloaded 3,588 BTC in its biggest Bitcoin sale since going all-in on the asset, a move that could reshape how corporate treasuries manage holdings and signals a notable shift in sentiment. More details → ⚖️ CLARITY Act misses July deadline as August 7 looms Congress missed its self-imposed July 4 deadline to pass the CLARITY Act, and the crypto market-structure bill now faces roughly a 50/50 shot of clearing the Senate before an August 7 target. Read more → 📬 Subscribe for the AI-curated daily crypto digest at cryptobeholder.com
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn

75696.subject: SCONTO - výzva k odberu
75696.body: .apply-styles body{margin:0;padding:0}.apply-styles img{border:0!important;outline:none!important}.apply-styles p{Margin:0px!important;Padding:0px!important}.apply-styles table{border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0px;mso-table-rspace:0px}.apply-styles td, .apply-styles a, .apply-styles span{border-collapse:collapse;mso-line-height-rule:exactly}.apply-styles a[x-apple-data-detectors], .apply-styles u+.-wm-em_body a{color:inherit!important;text-decoration:none;font-size:inherit!important;font-family:inherit!important;font-weight:inherit!important;line-height:inherit}@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_hide{display:none!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_show{display:block!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_block{display:block!important;width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-mobile_max_width{width:100%!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pl10{padding-left:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pr10{padding-right:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-pb10{padding-bottom:10px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-tac{text-align:center!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w107{width:107px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w150{width:150px!important}.apply-styles .-wm-w270{width:270px!important}} Vážený zákazník, Vaša kúpna zmluva č. 3671916 je pripravená k odberu. Kúpnu zmluvu môžete uhradiť v hotovosti či kartou na pokladni obchodného domu alebo priamo vo výdajnom sklade na samoobslužnej pokladni platobnou kartou. Nezabudnite si so sebou vziať kúpnu zmluvu - budete ju potrebovať pri platbe a pri preberaní tovaru zo skladu. Štandardná doba výdaja sa zvyčajne pohybuje okolo 10 minút. V prípade rozsiahlejších objednávok alebo počas denných špičiek sa však táto doba môže výrazne predĺžiť. Ak chcete dobu výdaja skrátiť, zarezervujte si, prosím, niektorý z voľných termínov tu . Tovar pre vás pripravíme vopred. V prípade akýchkoľvek otázok nás neváhajte kontaktovať. Telefón: +421 222 11 55 65 E-mail: zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Otváracie hodiny Vami vybraného obchodného domu nájdete tu . Ďakujeme za Váš nákup a želáme Vám príjemný deň. Vaše SCONTO Potrebujete poradiť? Sme tu pre Vás celý týždeň vrátane víkendov 8-18h +421 222 11 55 65 zakaznicky@servis.sconto.sk Vše o nákupu Obchodní podmínky Starostlivosť o nábytok Odstúpenie od zmluvy Reklamácie Sledujte nás Prevádzkovateľom internetového obchodu sconto.sk je SCONTO Nábytok s.r.o., Nová ul. 8144/10, 917 01 Trnava, IČO 44731159, DIČ 2022821273, IČ DPH SK 2022821273, zapísaná v obchodnom registri Okresného súdu Trnava, oddiel Sro, vložka 25761/T.
